description: Prior to issuing system credentials and granting system access, the entity registers and authorizes new internal and external users whose access is administered by the entity. User system credentials are removed when user access is no longer authorized.

subcriteria.name: access_provisioning
subcriteria.reference_text: Access request form or ticket submitted for new user access. Manager approval required before access is provisioned. Access granted based on role and job responsibilities. Provisioning tracked in Jira, ServiceNow, or identity management platform.

subcriteria.name: access_deprovisioning
subcriteria.reference_text: Termination checklist or offboarding ticket shows access revoked within 24 hours of employee separation. Active user list compared to HR termination list to verify no terminated employees retain access. Automated deprovisioning via SCIM or identity provider.

subcriteria.name: access_review
subcriteria.reference_text: Quarterly access review performed for all in-scope systems. Managers certify that each user's access is still appropriate for their role. Review log shows reviewer name, review date, and approval or removal action for each user. Inappropriate access removed via ticket.

mismatch_signals.reason: HR benefits onboarding is not access credential management.
Network security infrastructure is not user credential provisioning.
